inputs.label: Period (T)
inputs.businessContext: Time for one complete cycle. Used in f = 1/T.

inputs.label: Number of Cycles
inputs.businessContext: Number of cycles observed. Used with Total Time to compute frequency.

inputs.label: Total Time
inputs.businessContext: Total time over which cycles were counted. Used in f = cycles / time.

inputs.label: Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Wave propagation speed. Used with Wavelength to compute frequency.

inputs.label: Wavelength (λ)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between successive peaks. Used with Velocity in f = v/λ.

inputs.label: Angular Frequency (ω)
inputs.businessContext: Angular frequency in radians per second. Converted to Hz via f = ω/(2π).

inputs.label: Revolutions per Minute (RPM)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed in revolutions per minute. Converted to Hz via f = RPM/60.

formulas.frequency: period !== 0 ? 1 / period : (cycles !== 0 && time !== 0 ? cycles / time : (velocity !== 0 && wavelength !== 0 ? velocity / wavelength : (angularFrequency !== 0 ? angularFrequency / (2 * Math.PI) : (rpm !== 0 ? rpm / 60 : 0))))
